scripts.install-all: npm install && (cd api-gateway && npm install) && (cd authentication && npm install) && (cd image-pdf-service && npm install) && (cd server && npm install) && (cd client && npm install)
scripts.start-all: concurrently "npm run start-gateway" "npm run start-auth" "npm run start-media" "npm run start-server" "npm run start-client"
